metadata.title: Claude Code Repos Index
metadata.description: Curated index of Claude Code-related resources and projects

categories.name: Systems Administration
categories.description: Projects involving using Claude for local or remote systems administration as distinct from development-related projects.

repositories.name: Bash Alias Manager Claude
repositories.description: Workspace for managing bash aliases with YADM synchronization support.

repositories.name: Claude Bug Catcher
repositories.description: Hotkey-triggered utility that launches Claude Code with relevant logs for real-time Linux debugging.

repositories.name: Claude Code Bash Aliases
repositories.description: Collection of bash aliases for common Claude Code operations on Linux.

repositories.name: Claude Code LAN Manager
repositories.description: Workspace for centralized management of multiple LAN-connected machines through Claude Code. GUI application for managing local network devices through isolated, device-specific agent workspaces.

repositories.name: Claude Code Remote Machine Admin Space
repositories.description: Template for managing individual remote machines via SSH with structured system profiles and logs.

repositories.name: Claude Conda Manager
repositories.description: Workspace for managing Conda environments on Ubuntu workstations with AMD ROCm hardware.

repositories.name: Claude Rescue
repositories.description: Concept for deploying Claude Code into recovery shell environments for AI-assisted system repair.

repositories.name: Claude Server Manager Template
repositories.description: Server administration template with 38 slash commands and 10 agents optimized for Docker deployments.

repositories.name: Claude System Recovery Mode
repositories.description: Custom GRUB boot entry integrating Claude CLI into Linux system recovery workflows. Projects specifically targeting KDE Plasma desktop integration and Linux desktop workflows with Claude Code.

repositories.name: Claude Dolphin & Konsole Actions
repositories.description: KDE Dolphin right-click context menu actions (service menus) for launching Claude Code in various Konsole window layouts, including single terminal, split panes, and multi-instance grids.

repositories.name: Claude Bug Catcher
repositories.description: Hotkey-triggered utility that launches Claude Code with relevant logs for real-time Linux debugging.

repositories.name: Claude System Recovery Mode
repositories.description: Custom GRUB boot entry integrating Claude CLI into Linux system recovery workflows.

repositories.name: Claude MVT Workspace
repositories.description: Workspace orchestrating Mobile Verification Toolkit (MVT) spyware scans on Android devices via ADB, detecting indicators of compromise from targeted malware like Pegasus. Workspaces for decision-making, personal planning, file management, and general-purpose productivity workflows. > **See also:** The **[Claude Code Workspace Templates Index](https://github.com/danielrosehill/Claude-Code-Workspace-Templates-Index)** is a dedicated sub-index for all domain-specific workspace templates (budgeting, health, research, writing, etc.).

repositories.name: Claude Personal Development Workspace
repositories.description: Workspace for tracking habits, skill acquisition, and self-improvement goals with AI coaching. Workspaces and templates for legal research, case management, and evidence handling workflows.

repositories.name: ProofMode Unpacker
repositories.description: Utility for managing ProofMode evidence bundles with automated cloud backup and chain of custody preservation. Workspaces and templates for health documentation, medical visit management, therapy tracking, and health-related research.

repositories.name: Claude Health Helper
repositories.description: Workspace for organizing personal health documentation, visit preparation, and medical report summaries.

repositories.name: Claude Parenting Planner
repositories.description: Long-running parenting planning workspace covering schedules, developmental milestones, education choices, health records, parenting philosophies, decisions, and family-meeting logs — with a family-coordinator agent flagging conflicts and upcoming events. Workspaces and templates for content creation, blog management, writing workflows, and communications strategy.

repositories.name: Claude Code Writing Squad
repositories.description: Multi-agent writing system that refines text through specialized editing agents.

repositories.name: Claude Website Update Sender
repositories.description: Automated workflow for sending polished update emails about website changes via Resend MCP.

repositories.name: Declaude
repositories.description: Personalized text rewriting rules that consolidate into a slash command for refining AI-generated documentation. Workspaces and templates for budgeting, purchasing decisions, and personal finance management. Workspaces and templates for job searching, career planning, and professional development.

repositories.name: Claude Career Planning Template
repositories.description: Continuous professional development workspace tracking career goals, skills gap analysis, CPD log, courses, certifications, conferences, and quarterly learning plans — produces CV/LinkedIn-ready career narratives.

repositories.name: Claude Salary Research Agent
repositories.description: Systematic salary and compensation research workspace using publicly available sources, with commands for role scanning, benchmarking, benefits analysis, and formal report generation. Workspaces and templates for business planning, idea evaluation, and organizational continuity.

repositories.name: Claude Business Continuity Planner
repositories.description: Workspace for developing ISO 22301-aligned business continuity programs with slash commands.

repositories.name: Claude Business Evaluator
repositories.description: Systematically evaluates new business ideas (ICEC framework) and existing business performance (PRGX framework), optionally via a 6-persona council deliberation with blind ranking and chairman synthesis.

repositories.name: Claude Business Idea Evaluator
repositories.description: Framework for evaluating and ranking business ideas using the ICEC methodology.

repositories.name: Claude Competitor Research Agent
repositories.description: Workspace for systematic competitive intelligence research using public sources, with commands for competitor scanning, pricing analysis, and formal CI report generation. Workspaces and templates for document redaction, identity protection, and PII obfuscation. Workspaces for hardware planning, PC builds, and technology procurement.

repositories.name: Claude Ivory PC Builder
repositories.description: AI-powered PC component spec generator with real-time pricing from an Israeli retailer, historical price tracking, and compatibility verification. Workspaces for SEO, web analytics, PR monitoring, and media tracking.

repositories.name: Claude Media Monitor
repositories.description: Workspace for systematic news collection and organization with metadata and schema validation.

repositories.name: Claude News Fetcher - Media Monitoring System
repositories.description: Full-featured media monitoring workspace with structured data capture and batch processing.

repositories.name: Claude Web Analytics Space
repositories.description: Workspace template for SEO analytics with data cleaning, analysis, and reporting workflows.

categories.name: Argument and Perspective Exploration
categories.description: Projects using AI for synthesized debate to explore various perspectives, including policy modeling and analysis.

repositories.name: Claude Change My View
repositories.description: Workspace for challenging personal beliefs through AI-generated counterarguments and rebuttals.

repositories.name: Debate Mapper Template
repositories.description: Maps debates and compares policies across countries or political systems — identifies camps, key actors, and fault lines, then generates quadrant plots and cluster diagrams as PNG/SVG/JSON.

categories.name: Context and Personalization
categories.description: Projects exploring using Claude and related tooling for personalized user engagement, including through RAG, interviewing methods, and context injection.

repositories.name: Batch ClaudeMD Repo Creator
repositories.description: Automation workspace for batch-adding CLAUDE.md files across multiple GitHub repositories.

repositories.name: Claude Agent Workspace Model
repositories.description: The reference template for the agent workspace pattern — a defined folder structure and Claude Code scaffolding (CLAUDE.md, slash commands, subagents, MCP configs) for using a repository as a structured workspace for any activity, not just development. Point Claude at this repo to have it scaffold new workspaces following the model.

repositories.name: Claude Code Context Toolkit
repositories.description: Bridges human-friendly CONTEXT.md files with AI-optimized CLAUDE.md briefings via slash commands.

repositories.name: Claude Code Repo Managers ClaudeMD
repositories.description: Pre-configured CLAUDE.md templates for managing different repository types.

repositories.name: Claude Model Identifier
repositories.description: Prompt template for verifying the correct Claude model variant at conversation start.

repositories.name: ClaudeMD Turnstile
repositories.description: A turnstile pattern for CLAUDE.md that routes agents to the appropriate nested context file based on their purpose, avoiding unnecessary context ingestion in open-sourced repos.

repositories.name: CONTEXT.md
repositories.description: Workflow methodology for separating human-authored context from structured AI agent briefings.

repositories.name: Context Maintenance Template
repositories.description: Maintains an external Pinecone-backed RAG vector store over time — ingests new content, cleans up duplicates and stale entries, reconciles conflicts, and audits what's stored via the Pinecone MCP server.

repositories.name: Home Folder Claude MD
repositories.description: Version-controlled CLAUDE.md for applying Claude Code settings across a home directory.

repositories.name: Linux Desktop ClaudeMD Seeder
repositories.description: Automatically generates contextual CLAUDE.md files across a Linux desktop filesystem.

repositories.name: Private And Public Claude MD
repositories.description: Tools for managing public and private CLAUDE.md files with security-focused git configuration.

repositories.name: Split Context Setup
repositories.description: Slash command that scaffolds a structured context store with topic-based subfolders.

repositories.name: The User Voice Types
repositories.description: CLAUDE.md snippets and slash commands telling Claude to silently infer around transcription errors from voice typing and stray keystrokes from one-handed or distracted typing.

categories.name: Multi-Agent Tooling
categories.description: Components and tooling for multi-agent development and orchestration frameworks.

repositories.name: Agent Junction
repositories.description: MCP server enabling encrypted peer-to-peer communication between Claude Code instances on localhost or LAN.

repositories.name: Claude Agent Picker Pattern
repositories.description: Framework for assembling context-optimized multi-agent crews with minimal overlap.

repositories.name: Claude Agent Workspace Generator
repositories.description: Launchpad for creating standardized workspace templates conforming to the Agent Workspace Model v1.1 spec, with slash commands to generate, validate, and publish new workspaces.

repositories.name: Claude Repo Jumper
repositories.description: Skill for automating repository handovers with context-passing in multi-repo systems.

repositories.name: Claude Task Manager
repositories.description: Sequential task queuing system addressing context window exhaustion in agentic coding tools.

repositories.name: Claude Tech Research Team
repositories.description: Multi-agent system for evaluating software and hardware technologies with automated reporting.

repositories.name: Claude Development Agents
repositories.description: Curated toolkit of 74+ Claude Code configurations for development workflows and multi-agent coordination.

repositories.name: Claude Sub-Agent Network
repositories.description: Collection of system prompts and configurations for development, operational, and creative tasks.

repositories.name: Cool Claude Code Stuff
repositories.description: Curated collection of Claude Code projects and resources organized by category.

repositories.name: Claude Workspace Setup Helper
repositories.description: Interactive tool for discovering, selecting, and cloning Claude Workspace templates.

repositories.name: Claude Code Linux Notes
repositories.description: Personal documentation of workflows and tips for using Claude Code on Ubuntu with KDE Plasma.

categories.name: MCP
categories.description: Projects related to Claude and MCP tooling and setup.

repositories.name: Claude Code MCP Command Generator
repositories.description: Generator for creating MCP server configuration commands for Claude Code.

repositories.name: How-To-MCP
repositories.description: Guide for instructing AI agents on how to provision and manage MCP server connections according to user-specific preferences, with a tiered decision matrix.

repositories.name: Claude Code MCP List
repositories.description: Curated index of MCP servers organized into 14+ categories for extending Claude Code.

repositories.name: Claude MCP Guidelines
repositories.description: Guideline snippet for directing Claude Code on MCP usage across environments.

repositories.name: MCPM Claude Code Docs
repositories.description: Documentation for integrating Claude Code with MCPM external MCP server manager.

repositories.name: Smithery Claude Code MCP Jumpstarter
repositories.description: Curated collection of 35+ MCP servers with interactive installer across 15+ categories. <!-- GENERATED FROM data/marketplace.json — do not edit by hand. Run scripts/sync_marketplace.py or npm run build. -->

categories.name: Plugins
categories.description: All plugins registered in the [danielrosehill marketplace](https://github.com/danielrosehill/Claude-Code-Plugins). Install any of these with `/plugin install <name>@danielrosehill`.

repositories.name: New Repo From Template Plugin
repositories.description: Claude Code plugin that scaffolds new workspaces from a catalogue of 80+ template repositories spanning development, research, legal, finance, infrastructure, planning, writing, personal, knowledge, and simulation workflows. Each template is also available as a standalone GitHub repo for direct forking — the plugin simply provides a faster, unified way to instantiate them locally. See the plugin's [templates manifest](https://github.com/danielrosehill/New-Repo-From-Template-Plugin/blob/master/templates/manifest.json) for the full list.

categories.name: Slash Commands
categories.description: Individual slash commands, sometimes integrated into other plugins or sometimes just for use at the user level.

repositories.name: AI-Human Attribution Adder
repositories.description: Adds AI/human attribution sections to README files for transparent tool usage documentation.

repositories.name: Claude App Optimiser
repositories.description: Slash command deploying a sub-agent for codebase optimization and dead code removal.

repositories.name: Claude Calls The Shots
repositories.description: Flips Claude Code into autonomous, action-first mode — ships a per-session `/calls-the-shots` slash command plus an optional always-on snippet injected into `~/.claude/CLAUDE.md`.

repositories.name: Claude Code Linux Desktop Slash Commands
repositories.description: System administration slash commands for Linux desktop environments.

repositories.name: Claude Document This
repositories.description: Methods and slash commands for documenting system changes made by Claude Code.

repositories.name: Claude File Organiser Super Slash
repositories.description: Slash command that transforms disorganized filesystems into well-structured directories.

repositories.name: Claude MD Chunk
repositories.description: Slash command that condenses bloated CLAUDE.md files to essentials and organizes supplementary context into a structured `agent-context/` folder.

repositories.name: Claude Slash Commands
repositories.description: General-purpose slash command library for various Claude Code workflows.

repositories.name: No Wheel Inventions
repositories.description: Slash commands encouraging use of existing libraries instead of building custom solutions.
